channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Bubblegum Galaxy ‘Study Mode’ update now available for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

A new productivity companion feature.

Publisher Astrolabe Games and developer Smarto Club have released the free “Study Mode” update for the PC version of hex-tile building game Bubblegum Galaxy, which adds a new productivity companion feature where Haco joins players at her desk while they work or study.

Here is an overview of the mode, via Astrolabe Games:

In “Study Mode,” Haco joins players at her desk while they work or study, providing a relaxed co-working atmosphere. The mode includes a built-in music player featuring the game’s full high-quality soundtrack, as well as a Pomodoro-style focus timer to help structure work sessions. The window can be resized and pinned above other applications, making it easy to keep Haco present throughout the day.

Players’ existing office decorations and costumes carry over automatically into Study Mode. Those looking to customize Haco’s appearance or cubicle can do so from within the main game before launching the mode from the Main Menu.

Today’s update also includes a number of bug fixes. To celebrate, Bubblegum Galaxy is now available at a 20 percent discount—a good opportunity for anyone who has been on the fence. At the same time, players who are going to Gamescom LATAM can try the game at the venue at the Latin American Games Showcase booth!

Bubblegum Galaxy is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC via Steam.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/bubblegum-galaxy-study-mode-update-now-available-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 PS VR2 update now available
item.content:encoded:
• PS VR2
  • PS5

The sky is calling... in virtual reality!

The PlayStation VR2 update for the PlayStation 5 version of Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 is now available, publisher Xbox Game Studios and developer Asobo Studio announced.

Here is an overview of the update:

Explore new heights with the free PlayStation VR2 update available now for Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024. This new true-to-life experience delivers an enhanced level of authenticity in simulated flying for both fans and newcomers alike. With 125 different aircraft to fly, each with a unique experience via virtual reality, you’ll be closer than ever to experiencing the incredible sensation of flight straight from your console. The sky is calling!

Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 is available now for PlayStation5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store.

Watch a new trailer below.

PlayStation VR2 Update Launch Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/microsoft-flight-simulator-2024-ps-vr2-update-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
